MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Continued To Oct-21-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SATINDER SINGH'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF RAVINDER SANDHU'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's demurrers to the first amended complaint (FAC) are overruled. Conversion (Tesla) [1]. The FAC pleads for "return" of plaintiff's property in the alternative, which is permissible. (Id. at 5:3-4, 11-12.) Conversion (Joint Savings Account) [2]. The FAC pleads an agreement that the parties would each deposit 10% of their monthly salaries into the account, with each to "own" half the balance. (Id. at 6:1-7.) Defendant later withdrew "near the entirety" of the account balance and refuses to return plaintiff's share, thus converting his half. (Id. at 1:8-20.) No "right to payment" seems to be at issue, nor is the parties' ownership based on each's contributions, so defendants' cited authorities appear inapposite. In any event, the facts need development. Breach of Contract (Joint Savings Account) [4]. The alleged breach is not, as defendant asserts, that she failed to deposit 10% of her salary in the account, but rather that she "wrongfully withdrew $22,500.00, nearly the entirety of the account balance." (Cmplt. 9:10-12.) Further, executed agreements are not subject to the statute of frauds. (Dean v. Davis (1946) 73 Cal.App2d 166, 168.)
Breach of Contract (Tesla) [5]. The FAC adequately pleads that defendant agreed to joint ownership and possession of the Tesla, but then breached. (Id. at 10:1-4.) Ownership connotes unlimited duration.
Fraud & Negligent Misrepresentation [6-8]. These torts are pled with sufficient specificity. (See, e.g., Cmplt. 2:9-15, 19-23; 3:1-4, 8-11; 4:4-9; 10:18-15:4.) Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
